NTE 异环攻略
角色 探索 机制 工具 关于 联系 隐私 声明 搜索
首页 角色攻略 地图探索 机制/新手 抽卡/养成工具 关于/更新日志 联系我们 编辑准则 隐私政策 免责声明
本站整理角色、地图、异象委托和工具内容，持续按版本更新。

Hethereau Exploration

地图 / 探索攻略

面向开服一个月后的补探索阶段：优先建立传送网络，再按城区处理电话亭、谕石、隐藏宝箱、拍照打卡、异象委托和高低层补漏。

推荐清图顺序

1. 点亮塔和电话亭

先解锁维特海默塔、ReroRero 电话亭和主干道传送点，后续补支线、材料和隐藏收集会节省大量时间。

2. 按区域分层清理

海特洛是多层城市结构。每个区域都按地面、地下/桥下、屋顶/高架的顺序扫，避免只看平面标记。

3. 异象委托后置补漏

高威胁异象和复杂解谜可以等队伍成型再打。异象解除后再回头检查隐藏宝箱和新交互点。

全图路线 Full Map Route

先点塔，再铺电话亭，最后按区域清谕石、异象委托和隐藏宝箱。 Activate towers first, then phone booths, then clear oracle stones, anomaly commissions and hidden chests by district.

维特海默塔与全图点亮路线 Wertheimer Towers and Full-Map Unlock Route

维特海默塔点亮与全图开荒路线，适合开服一个月后补探索度、电话亭、异象委托和区域解锁。 A tower-first exploration route for unlocking the map, phone booths, anomaly commissions and regional access after the first month.

推荐路线

  1. 1 打开大地图缩小视野，优先前往灰色高塔图标。 Open the world map, zoom out, and head for gray tower icons first.
  2. 2 点亮维特海默塔后，沿主干道顺路激活电话亭。 After activating a Wertheimer Tower, follow the main roads and unlock nearby phone booths.
  3. 3 每个城区先清传送点和委托入口，不急着追 100%。 In each district, clear teleport points and commission entrances before chasing 100% completion.
  4. 4 等主队成型后，再回头清高威胁异象和隐藏宝箱。 Return to high-threat anomalies and hidden chests after your main DPS and survival slot are ready.

收集清单

  • 维特海默塔点亮 Wertheimer Tower activation
  • ReroRero 电话亭传送网络 ReroRero phone booth teleport network
  • 区域异象委托入口 Regional anomaly commission entrances
  • 谕石、隐藏宝箱、拍照打卡 Oracle stones, hidden chests and photo spots
  • 世界 BOSS、周本和特殊传送入口 World boss, weekly boss and special teleport entrances

异象提示

  • 点塔后会更容易规划区域路线和异象委托。Towers make regional routing and anomaly commission planning much easier.
  • 电话亭是后续材料、房产、支线和补探索的核心效率点。Phone booths are the core efficiency points for materials, housing, side quests and exploration cleanup.

补漏避坑

  • 不要开局追逐单个隐藏点，先建立传送网络收益更高。Do not chase single hidden points at the start; building the teleport network gives better returns.
  • 高难异象可以标记后延后处理，等主C和生存位成型再打。Mark high-difficulty anomalies and return later after your carry and survival role are built.
  • 探索度最后 5%-10% 建议配合筛选清单查漏。For the final 5%-10% exploration, use a filtered checklist to avoid random wandering.

Area Role

Wertheimer Towers are the starting point of full-map exploration. They define regional outlines, reveal commissions and dramatically improve route planning. One month after launch, the common problem is not combat power but missing teleport points that force repeated driving.

Clearing Logic

Use the order: towers -> phone booths -> commissions -> collectibles. This lets you switch quickly between story, events, material farming and anomaly commissions without wasting travel time.

Cleanup Focus

If only a small amount of exploration remains, check phone booths, photo spots and anomaly commission follow-ups first. Hidden chests are less obvious than teleport points, but they often appear near building edges, under bridges and in areas changed after anomalies are resolved.

新赫兰德区 New Herland

优先解锁商业街、车行和广场周边电话亭，后续经营、买车和材料路线都会频繁往返。 Unlock phone booths around the commercial street, car dealer and plaza first because later operations, vehicle purchases and material routes return here often.

新赫兰德区电话亭与商业街补漏 New Herland Phone Booths and Commercial Street Cleanup

新赫兰德区探索攻略，整理商业街、车行、广场、楼顶路线、电话亭解锁与经营相关点位。 New Herland exploration route covering commercial streets, the car dealer, plaza, rooftops, phone booths and operation-related points.

推荐路线

  1. 1 从商业街主电话亭出发，先沿街道两侧扫店铺入口、自动售卖机和巷口收集。 Start from the main commercial-street phone booth and sweep shop entrances, vending machines and alley mouths on both sides.
  2. 2 前往车行与停车场，检查坡道、地下车位和楼梯背面。 Move to the car dealer and parking area; check ramps, underground spaces and the backs of staircases.
  3. 3 绕广场外圈一周，补拍照点、城市打卡和屋顶入口。 Circle the plaza to pick up photo spots, city check-ins and rooftop entrances.
  4. 4 最后清理商业街背街、高层平台和任务 NPC 周边。 Finish with back streets, high platforms and quest NPC areas.

收集清单

  • 商业街 ReroRero 电话亭 Commercial Street ReroRero phone booth
  • 车行、停车场和载具相关交互点 Car dealer, parking lot and vehicle interactions
  • 广场拍照打卡与隐藏宝箱 Plaza photo spots and hidden chests
  • 店铺经营、房产和城市生活入口 Shop operation, housing and city-life entrances
  • 楼顶平台与高层边缘收集 Rooftop platforms and high-edge collectibles

异象提示

  • 商业街异象通常与人群、霓虹灯或店铺门口交互有关。Commercial-street anomalies often involve crowds, neon lights or interactions near shop doors.
  • 部分经营与支线点位需要白天或主线推进后才显示。Some operation and side-quest points only appear during daytime or after story progress.

补漏避坑

  • 商业街标记密集，建议开启筛选逐项清理。Markers are dense in the commercial street, so use filters and clear them one by one.
  • 买车或升级店铺前先确认抽卡与养成预算，避免方斯短缺。Check your gacha and growth budget before buying cars or upgrading shops, or Fons may run short.
  • 高层平台不要只靠小地图，很多入口在背街楼梯。For high platforms, do not rely only on the minimap; many entrances are on back-street stairs.

Area Role

New Herland is one of the districts players revisit most after early progression. It connects commerce, vehicles, operations and city-life systems, so its exploration value is not only Annulith and chests but also long-term route efficiency.

Clearing Logic

Build the phone-booth network first, then use a vehicle to sweep the outer main roads. The commercial street is marker-heavy, so it is better to return for a dedicated cleanup after basic teleport points are unlocked.

Cleanup Focus

The most commonly missed points are parking ramps, alleys behind shops and rooftop platforms. When the marker height does not match your character, look for stairs, elevators or vehicle ramps before circling the same street.

新港区 New Port

先点电话亭与主干道传送，再清高架、屋顶和地下入口。 Activate phone booths and main-road teleports first, then clear elevated roads, rooftops and underground entrances.

新港区隐藏收集与异象事件 New Port Hidden Collectibles and Anomaly Events

面向开服一个月玩家的新港区探索路线，覆盖电话亭、楼顶收集、高架夹层、异象事件和补漏顺序。 A New Port route for phone booths, rooftop collectibles, elevated-road layers, anomaly events and cleanup order.

推荐路线

  1. 1 从地铁口或主干道电话亭出发，沿商业街外圈点亮传送与店铺入口。 Start from the subway entrance or main-road phone booth and unlock teleports and shop entrances around the commercial outer loop.
  2. 2 沿高架桥下层检查支柱阴影、停车区和坡道转角，优先拿低位收集。 Check pillars, parking areas and ramp corners under the elevated road, taking low-level collectibles first.
  3. 3 回到霓虹广场，从外侧消防梯或相邻楼顶切入屋顶群。 Return to the neon plaza and enter rooftop clusters from fire escapes or adjacent buildings.
  4. 4 最后扫废弃站台入口、地下通道和夜间异象刷新点。 Finish with abandoned platform entrances, underground passages and night anomaly spawn points.

收集清单

  • ReroRero 电话亭与主干道快速传送点 ReroRero phone booths and main-road fast travel
  • 高架桥下层数据芯片、补给箱和调查记录 Data chips, supply boxes and investigation logs under elevated roads
  • 霓虹广场屋顶异象碎片与拍照点 Rooftop anomaly fragments and photo spots around the neon plaza
  • 废弃站台入口隐藏调查物 Hidden investigation objects near abandoned station entrances
  • 夜间异常灯光、信号噪点和空间扭曲交互点 Night abnormal lights, signal noise and spatial-distortion interactions

异象提示

  • 夜间 20:00-04:00 更适合巡查异常灯光与街道噪点。Night patrols from 20:00-04:00 are better for abnormal lights and street noise.
  • 遇到小范围空间扭曲时，先绕场一圈找调查点，不要直接离开区域。When you see small spatial distortions, circle the area for the investigation point instead of leaving immediately.

补漏避坑

  • 高架桥上下层容易误判高度，地图标记在头顶时优先找楼梯或坡道。Elevated roads are easy to misread vertically; if a marker is above you, find stairs or ramps first.
  • 屋顶收集建议从高点往低点扫，反向路线会重复爬楼。For rooftops, sweep from high to low to avoid repeated climbing.
  • 异象事件可能刷精英敌人，队伍至少带一个生存位。Anomaly events can spawn elites, so bring at least one survival character.

Hidden Collectibles

New Port's collectibles are highly vertical. The main roads look open, but the easy misses are under elevated roads, along rooftop edges and near subway entrance corners. Build the teleport network first, then clean in the order: low roads -> elevated underside -> rooftop groups -> underground entrances.

Anomaly Events

Patrol between 20:00 and 04:00 for better anomaly efficiency. If streetlights flicker, signals distort or a small space warp appears, do not only inspect the center. The interactable point is often beside street furniture, alley mouths or behind staircases.

Route Advice

After one month, most players have vehicles and multiple booths. There is no need to walk New Port from scratch. Use phone booths as nodes and clear one block at a time, checking exploration progress after each block so one rooftop marker does not waste your final cleanup.

绘空町 Ekorai Town

先清主线与异象委托入口，再按屋顶和窄巷分层补收集。 Clear story and anomaly entrances first, then split rooftop and narrow-alley collectibles by layer.

绘空町异象委托与屋顶路线 Ekorai Town Anomaly Commissions and Rooftop Route

绘空町探索攻略，覆盖影像幽宅、屋顶收集、窄巷调查、异象委托和夜间异常事件巡查。 Ekorai Town exploration covering Image Haunted House, rooftop collectibles, narrow-alley investigation points, anomaly commissions and night patrols.

推荐路线

  1. 1 传送到绘空町主街电话亭，先确认异象委托与支线入口。 Teleport to the main-street phone booth and confirm anomaly commission and side-quest entrances.
  2. 2 沿水梨子大道周边小巷巡查，处理可见调查点。 Patrol alleys around Suinarashi Avenue and clear visible investigation points.
  3. 3 从较高建筑切入屋顶，按顺时针方向清理楼顶收集。 Enter rooftops from taller buildings and sweep clockwise.
  4. 4 回到地面补窄巷、招牌背后和店铺门口隐藏物。 Return to ground level for narrow alleys, signboard backs and hidden objects near shop doors.

收集清单

  • 影像幽宅、幽巷隐宅等异象委托入口 Image Haunted House and Hidden Alley Mansion anomaly entrances
  • 屋顶谕石、异象碎片和隐藏宝箱 Rooftop oracle stones, anomaly fragments and hidden chests
  • 小巷调查记录、异常光圈和可交互放映机 Alley investigation logs, abnormal light rings and interactable projectors
  • 拍照打卡点与区域探索度补漏 Photo spots and exploration cleanup points

异象提示

  • 部分异象委托需要猎人等级和主线进度达标。Some anomaly commissions require hunter level and story progress.
  • 放映机类解谜需要区分“播放到红色区间”和“直接关闭”。Projector puzzles require distinguishing between playing to the red zone and shutting the projector off directly.

补漏避坑

  • 绘空町屋顶路线很绕，建议从高点往低点清。Ekorai rooftops are winding; clear from high to low.
  • 异象空间内如果机关没变化，优先检查是否误选播放/关闭。If an anomaly-space device does not change, check whether you selected play or shut-off incorrectly.
  • BOSS 房前先补状态，避免解谜结束后直接进入战斗。Heal and prepare before the boss room, because puzzle completion can flow directly into combat.

Area Role

Ekorai Town focuses on anomaly commissions and layered rooftops. Exploration is not a simple road loop: many points sit on high buildings, in narrow alley corners or inside anomaly spaces.

Clearing Logic

Do anomaly commissions before ordinary cleanup. Once an anomaly is resolved, nearby hidden rewards or new interactions may appear, which reduces repeated travel.

Cleanup Focus

If exploration is stuck above 90%, inspect rooftop edges, deep alleys and leftover chests inside mission spaces. Ekorai has obvious height differences, so flat minimap markers can easily mislead you.

桥间地 Bridge Crossings

优先解锁跨区传送与桥头电话亭，再处理桥面、桥下和匝道夹层。 Unlock inter-district teleports and bridgehead booths first, then clear bridge decks, undersides and ramp layers.

桥间地高架与跨区路线 Bridge Crossings Elevated Roads and Inter-District Routes

桥间地探索攻略，整理跨桥传送、高架上下层、道路夹角、车辆路线和异常事件处理顺序。 Bridge Crossings exploration guide for bridge teleports, upper/lower layers, road corners, vehicle routes and anomaly event order.

推荐路线

  1. 1 从桥头电话亭出发，先确认两端传送点和主路连接。 Start from a bridgehead phone booth and confirm teleports and main-road links at both ends.
  2. 2 沿桥面清理可见收集与拍照点，不急着跳到下层。 Clear visible collectibles and photo spots on the bridge deck before jumping to lower layers.
  3. 3 从匝道或楼梯进入桥下空间，检查支柱、河岸和平台阴影。 Enter underside spaces from ramps or stairs and inspect pillars, riverbanks and platform shadows.
  4. 4 最后用载具跑一遍外圈道路，补路边异常事件。 Use a vehicle to run the outer roads and finish roadside anomaly events.

收集清单

  • 桥头 ReroRero 电话亭 Bridgehead ReroRero phone booths
  • 桥面拍照点和可见宝箱 Bridge-deck photo spots and visible chests
  • 桥下支柱、平台和河岸收集 Under-bridge pillars, platforms and riverbank collectibles
  • 匝道夹层调查记录 Ramp-layer investigation logs
  • 跨区道路异常事件 Inter-district road anomaly events

异象提示

  • 桥间地异常事件经常与车辆追逐、道路封锁或环境伤害有关。Bridge anomalies often involve vehicle chases, roadblocks or environmental damage.
  • 部分桥下点位需要从远处匝道绕入，不能从标记正上方直达。Some underside points require entering from a distant ramp rather than dropping from the marker.

补漏避坑

  • 桥上桥下高度差很大，先找入口再追标记。The height gap between bridge deck and underside is large; find entrances before chasing markers.
  • 载具速度太快容易错过路边交互，补漏时建议慢速巡查。Fast vehicles can skip roadside interactions, so slow down during cleanup.
  • 高威胁事件先清小怪再打精英，避免被地形卡位。For high-threat events, clear small enemies before elites to avoid terrain traps.

Area Role

Bridge Crossings connect multiple districts, so teleport and vehicle-route value is high. The collectible density is moderate, but the upper/lower structure makes position mistakes common.

Clearing Logic

Clear the bridge deck first, then the underside, then the outer roads. The deck gives good visibility and direction; underside pillars and ramp layers are the main late-stage cleanup targets.

Cleanup Focus

When a marker sits near the bridge edge, do not immediately jump down. Many points require entering from bridgehead ramps, and dropping directly only increases the return trip.

© 2026 异环攻略站. 玩家自建攻略站，非游戏官方网站。
